sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁבּלת שׁבּל

Transliteration: shibbôl shibbôleth

Phonetic: shib-bole

BDB Definition:

  1. flowing stream
  2. ear (of grain), head of grain
    1. as growing
    2. cluster

Origin: from the same as H7640, a stream (as flowing)

TWOT entry: 2316b,2316c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
